pages.title: The Research Tree
pages.text:
Your settlement generates &9science&r over time. The header at the top shows how much you earn each second. Every &6citizen&r adds to the rate, so a growing settlement learns faster!

&bDrag&r the board to pan around, and &bscroll&r to zoom.

pages.title: Starting research
pages.text:
&bLeft-click&r an available node to start researching it. &bRight-click&r a node deeper in the tree to &6queue&r it, along with any missing prerequisites, in order.

Only &cone&r research can be active at a time, but no progress is ever lost.

pages.title: Eras ahead
pages.text:
The tree is divided into &6eras&r. Nodes beyond your current era stay locked until your settlement advances. Hover over any node to see what completing it will unlock.

New tabs like &dCulture&r and &eFaith&r will appear up here as your settlement develops.
